title: Judge orders ChudTheBuilder to wear GPS monitor and restrict social media use if released on bond
summary_full: Controversial streamer Dalton Eatherly, known as ChudTheBuilder, faces stringent bail conditions following serious charges linked to a courthouse shooting. If released, he'll be electronically monitored via GPS, must surrender all weapons, and is banned from discussing the case publicly or on social media. These measures aim to ensure public safety and protect the ongoing legal proceedings.
